title: Gooey Argentinian Beef Skewers
description: A fermented, gooey post-workout Argentinian dish featuring pomegranate, perfect for a Mediterranean-friendly meal. Marinated beef skewers are broiled to perfection and served with a side of tangy pomegranate sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together pomegranate juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, red pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef strips to the marinade and mix well to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated beef strips onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Broil the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
While the skewers are cooking, mix together pomegranate seeds and chopped parsley in a small bowl.
Once the skewers are done, brush them with the pomegranate seed mixture.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional pomegranate seeds and parsley if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the juices to redistribute.
Serve with a side of tangy pomegranate sauce, if desired.
